displayName: siamSquare พจนานุกรมไทย คลังคำ
description:
A Thai word repository containing over 30,000 Thai words with Thai definitions.
Hot Keys:
CTRL+F1 : Open Layer Keys
F1 : word meaning
F2 : Misspelled words and similar words
F3 : Spell words
F4 : Open Siam Center Dictionary
changelog: Migrated to file JSON system, added two-tier dictionary (base + user), improved suggestion matching for Thai misspellings, fixed F2/F3 commands, added CapsLock support for Thai characters.
